description: An agent must coordinate with the lender and title company to confirm that all conditions are met for the transaction to close.

nodes.task_description: Contact the buyer's mortgage lender to confirm they have issued the 'clear to close'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives written confirmation from the lender that the loan is approved and funded.

nodes.task_description: Contact the title company to ensure the title search is complete and there are no liens or encumbrances.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the title is clear.

nodes.task_description: Notify all parties (buyer, seller, other agent) that the transaction is officially clear to close and confirm the closing appointment.

expected_outcome.value: A confirmation email is sent to all stakeholders.
